context: Tests whether the agent extracts the specific per-page content that the skill requires: tagline, hero headline, and CTAs from the fetched pages, as well as capturing idiomatic brand vocabulary. Also checks that multiple pages were analyzed and sources documented.

checklist.name: Tagline captured
checklist.description: voice.md includes a section or label explicitly identifying the brand's tagline or primary brand promise as seen on the site (not paraphrased — a direct or near-direct quote)

checklist.name: Hero headline captured
checklist.description: voice.md identifies at least one hero headline — the large lead copy a visitor sees on a key page — and labels it as such

checklist.name: CTA phrases — at least 2
checklist.description: voice.md includes at least 2 distinct call-to-action phrases pulled from the site (button text, subscribe prompts, imperative copy — e.g. 'Subscribe Now', 'Get Your Crate')

checklist.name: CTA section distinct
checklist.description: The CTAs are grouped in a dedicated section or clearly labelled subsection of voice.md, not buried inline in prose

checklist.name: Vocabulary — words to use
checklist.description: voice.md contains a list or section of specific words or phrases the brand uses (idiomatic vocabulary, recurring terms)

checklist.name: Vocabulary — words to avoid
checklist.description: voice.md contains a section of words or phrases that are off-brand or should be avoided

checklist.name: 3–5 sample paragraphs
checklist.description: voice.md contains between 3 and 5 sample paragraphs written in the brand's voice

checklist.name: Multiple pages analyzed
checklist.description: source.json 'sources' array contains at least 2 distinct URLs showing that more than just the homepage was visited

checklist.name: source.json fetched_at ISO
checklist.description: source.json has a 'fetched_at' field containing an ISO 8601 date string
